title: cyperus odoratus subsp. odoratus
intro: Cyperus odoratus subsp. odoratus, also known as the fragrant flat sedge, is a perennial plant species in the sedge family Cyperaceae. It is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and expectorant properties. The plant has been used to treat various health issues, including respiratory problems, fever, and skin conditions, due to its ability to ease congestion and reduce inflammation. Herbal preparations of Cyperus odoratus subsp. odoratus, such as teas and infusions, can be used to promote relaxation, alleviate coughs, and support overall health.
